import struct

sig,ver,flag,method,mt,md,crc,csize,usize,nlen,elen=struct.unpack('<IHHHHHIIIHH',data[off:off+30])

name=data[off+30:off+30+nlen]
start=off+30+nlen+elen
payload=data[start:start+usize]
print('name',name,'payload',repr(payload))
EOF

input.command:
cd /app/varsea; python3 - <<'EOF'
import struct,re
data=open('/app/varsea/disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat','rb').read()
found=set()
for off in [m.start() for m in re.finditer(b'PK\x03\x04',data)]:
    sig,ver,flag,method,mt,md,crc,csize,usize,nlen,elen=struct.unpack('<IHHHHHIIIHH',data[off:off+30])
    name=data[off+30:off+30+nlen]
    if b'launchcode' not in name: continue
    start=off+30+nlen+elen
    payload=data[start:start+usize]
    line=payload.decode('latin1').strip()
    if line.startswith('PASSWORD='):
        pw=line.split('=',1)[1].strip()
        ok = len(pw)==23 and pw.startswith('8XD') and pw.endswith('W54') and re.fullmatch(r'[A-Z0-9]+',pw)
        print('candidate',pw,'valid',bool(ok))
        if ok: found.add(pw)
with open('/app/recovered_passwords.txt','w') as f:
    for pw in found: f.write(pw+'\n')
print('written',found)
EOF
echo "=== file ==="; cat /app/recovered_passwords.txt | sed 's/./&/g'; wc -c /app/recovered_passwords.txt

input.command:
cd /app/varsea; python3 - <<'EOF'
import re
found=set()
allc=[]
for path in __import__('glob').glob('/app/varsea/**/*',recursive=True):
    import os
    if not os.path.isfile(path): continue
    data=open(path,'rb').read()
    for m in re.finditer(rb'PASSWORD=([A-Z0-9]{23})',data):
        pw=m.group(1).decode()
        allc.append((os.path.basename(path),m.start(),pw))
        if pw.startswith('8XD') and pw.endswith('W54'):
            found.add(pw)
for c in allc: print(c)
print('=== valid ===',found)
with open('/app/recovered_passwords.txt','w') as f:
    for pw in sorted(found): f.write(pw+'\n')
EOF
echo "=== recovered ==="; cat /app/recovered_passwords.txt

EOF

input.command:
cd /app/varsea; python3 - <<'EOF'
import re,glob,os
for path in glob.glob('/app/varsea/**/*',recursive=True):
    if not os.path.isfile(path): continue
    data=open(path,'rb').read()
    for pat in [b'8XD',b'W54',b'PASSWORD']:
        for m in re.finditer(re.escape(pat),data):
            s=m.start()
            frag=data[max(0,s-12):s+30]
            asc=''.join(chr(b) if 32<=b<127 else '.' for b in frag)
            print(os.path.basename(path),pat.decode(),s,asc)
EOF
